pytorch.reason: not needed -- no autograd layer in this SMT proof

proof1_symmetry.interpretation: UNSAT: no p exists where suppression magnitudes differ -> symmetry proven

proof2_negativity_boundary.claim: I_c >= -log(2) for Z-dephasing on 2-qubit state with 1-qubit env
proof2_negativity_boundary.interpretation: UNSAT: no configuration achieves I_c < -log(2) -> lower bound proven

proof3_relay_load_bearing.claim: XX_23=0 implies I_c(AB->C) cannot exceed I_c(A->BC)
proof3_relay_load_bearing.interpretation: UNSAT: disconnected relay cannot create partition advantage -> relay is load-bearing

boundary_p0_p1_identity.assertion: I_c(p=0) = I_c(p=1) -- endpoints are identical (full symmetry)
boundary_p0_p1_identity.note: p=0 and p=1 are identical channels (Z^2=I), so off_diag same
